title: Eternal Quests: RPG Overhaul
description: Dive into Eternal Quests: RPG Overhaul! One mod, endless adventure—epic weapons, powerful armour, and fierce foes await. Forge your path and become a legend!
body:
[JOIN THE DISCORD FOR FEEDBACK, SUPPORT AND LEAKS](https://discord.gg/wsjAfkpn4X)

Eternal Quests: RPG Overhaul

Eternal Quests: RPG Overhaul transforms Minecraft into a deep RPG adventure, adding rich progression systems, unique items, and innovative mechanics inspired by the best RPG experiences. Designed to deliver the depth and variety of a full modpack in a single mod, it lets you dive straight into epic gameplay.

Current features include powerful new equipment, dynamic stat systems, and engaging gameplay mechanics—while upcoming updates promise even more content, refined balance, and exciting new items.

Join our Discord to share feedback, report bugs, and help shape the future of Eternal Quests!
